## Demo Checklist

- [ ] I can run the code.
- [ ] I can explain what changed.
- [ ] I can explain one concept I learned.
- [ ] I can explain one bug or mistake.
- [ ] I can explain any AI help I used.
- [ ] I can make one small live change without AI.
